title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
